hero.description: Built for Public Relations, Marketing, Creators, and Talent teams. Analyze profiles, classify with AI, and generate strategic outputs in minutes.

features.title: Workflows designed for intelligence at scale
features.description: Designed for teams that need operational social data, AI enrichment, and strategy-ready outputs in one unified platform.

instagramDataCapture.title: Instagram Data Capture
instagramDataCapture.description: Collect profile snapshots, posts, reels, and key engagement fields seamlessly in one automated workflow.

aiProfileClassification.title: AI Profile Classification
aiProfileClassification.description: Classify creators by nuanced categories and roles to accelerate shortlist quality and targeting precision.

performanceReports.title: Performance Reports
performanceReports.description: Generate downloadable PDF outputs from stored Instagram snapshots and historical metrics.

campaignStrategy.title: Campaign Strategy
campaignStrategy.description: Build brand-level strategy inputs leveraging audience demographics, goals, and custom creator sets.

creatorStrategy.title: Creator Strategy
creatorStrategy.description: Generate creator-specific strategy outputs grounded on profile context, performance, and reputation signals.

asyncJobsPersistence.title: Async Jobs & Persistence
asyncJobsPersistence.description: Run heavy scrape jobs with status tracking, retries, and durable storage across profile collections.

pricing.title: Start free, then continue with the base monthly plan
pricing.description: Try Kiizama for 7 days without adding a card. When you are ready, the Base plan is $389 MXN per month (IVA included).
pricing.ready: Ready to turn creator data into clearer decisions?

trial.name: Free Trial
trial.description: Explore Kiizama with a 7-day trial before choosing a paid plan.

features.noCard: No credit or debit card to start

base.name: Base
base.description: The current monthly plan for teams that need ongoing creator intelligence.

platformSupport.question: Which social platform is supported today?
platformSupport.answer: Kiizama currently focuses on Instagram workflows, including profile snapshots, report generation, and reputation strategy outputs.

reportOutputs.question: What outputs does the platform generate?
reportOutputs.answer: You can generate PDF reports. Multi-profile requests can be delivered as a ZIP file containing each output.

aiEnrichment.question: Do you use AI in the analysis flow?
aiEnrichment.answer: Yes. The platform enriches profiles with AI categories and roles, and powers campaign and creator reputation strategy generation.

requestLimits.question: Are there operational limits per request?
requestLimits.answer: Yes. The Base plan currently includes 50 profile lookups, 20 social media reports, and 5 reputation strategy requests per monthly cycle. Per-request caps still apply: up to 10 usernames per scrape job, up to 20 usernames per Instagram report request, and up to 15 profiles per campaign strategy request. We will add new plans or adjust limits as demand grows.

index.title: The latest Kiizama insights
index.description: Product thinking, workflow notes, and reputation intelligence perspectives from Kiizama.

footer.tagline: Advanced reputation intelligence and strategic workflows for modern brand and creator teams.

cookiePanel.title: Kiizama uses cookies to offer you a better experience.
cookiePanel.description: By clicking "Accept all", you agree to the storing of cookies on your device for functional, analytics, and advertising purposes.
